text: Haan, aur logon ko lagta hai kismat hi kharab hai meri. Ye sochke jalan fir bhadki.

strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke baad short non-question restatement se shame hold karna.
text: Kismat ke label aur logon ki baat ka bojh tumhe andar se kaafi chubh raha hai...

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Supporter
